app.name: Mailbox
app.one_liner: A self-hosted, serverless email infrastructure on AWS that receives, stores, and serves emails via a web interface with dark/light mode support.

screens.name: Inbox
screens.purpose: Display list of received emails with theme support (dark/light mode).
primary_actions: Toggle between dark and light mode

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist email metadata or content to storage (e.g., DynamoDB or S3).

mvp_plan: week 1: Configure IAM permissions (refined from AdministratorAccess)
week 1: Deploy SES rule to deliver to S3 and invoke Lambda
week 1: Set up Serverless/Terraform environment variables
acceptance_tests: Lambda function processes email and writes metadata to DynamoDB.
System ingests email via SES and stores it in S3 bucket.
Web UI displays email list with correct theme based on user preference.
